problem.title: Intersection of Two Arrays
problem.description: Given two integer arrays nums1 and nums2, return an array of their intersection.

example.explanation: Intersection contains each unique element that appears in both arrays. 2 appears in both, but result has no duplicates.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – HashSet [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: Load all elements of the first array into a set, then iterate over the second array and collect any element that appears in the set into a result set. Using a set for the result automatically deduplicates the output so each value appears at most once. The key insight is that two set lookups replace the O(n*m) brute-force comparison, reducing the time complexity to O(n+m).
